allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json a=json.load\(open\('/mnt/e/ai/gender-voice-visualization/stats.json'\)\) b=json.load\(open\('/mnt/e/ai/gender-voice-visualization/stats_zh.json'\)\) print\('EN stdevs sample:'\) for k in ['IY1','AA1','AE1','AO1','EH1','UW1']: if k in a: print\(k,'F1 mean/sd',round\(a[k][1]['mean']\),round\(a[k][1]['stdev']\),'F2',round\(a[k][2]['mean']\),round\(a[k][2]['stdev']\),'F3',round\(a[k][3]['mean']\),round\(a[k][3]['stdev']\)\) print\('ZH:'\) for k in ['a','i','u','e','o','y']: print\(k,'F1',b[k][1]['mean'],b[k][1]['stdev'],'F2',b[k][2]['mean'],b[k][2]['stdev'],'F3',b[k][3]['mean'],b[k][3]['stdev']\) " grep -rn "stats.json" /mnt/e/ai/gender-voice-visualization --include="*.py" --include="*.cgi" --include="*.md" --include="*.sh")
